overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from covered neon-lit streets to open waterfront promenades. The footage features futuristic architecture with Japanese signage, holographic billboards, and dynamic lighting mixing natural sunlight with artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial intersection with neon signage

events.description: turns right from initial position onto sidewalk path alongside metal guardrail

agents.ego_description: navigating through a neon-lit urban intersection and proceeding along a sidewalk with metal guardrails

entered.detail: purple neon hotel sign mounted on building facade
silver metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
multiple layered holographic advertisements with Japanese text
elevated highway structure casting shadows on the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk intersection with prominent neon signage. The camera turns right onto a sidewalk bordered by a metal guardrail, walking past concrete buildings with mixed lighting from natural sun and artificial neon sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath urban overpasses

events.description: enters deeper shadow beneath the concrete overpass structure
approaching exit from covered walkway into brighter open area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a shadowed corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete support beams and ceiling of the elevated highway
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
illuminated vending machine with red and green neon accents

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow enclosed corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses. The lighting shifts to artificial neon dominance as the sky becomes mostly blocked, with the metal guardrail now on the left side as the path progresses toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional commercial street approaching waterfront district

events.description: large flatbed truck drives past on the adjacent road
exits covered shadow area into direct sunlight exposure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to brighter lighting and approaching waterfront views

notable_agents.action: large flatbed truck driving past on the road from left to right

entered.detail: metal barrier along the edge of the water becoming visible in the distance
massive screen displaying advertisements on building facade
colorful fabric awning over commercial entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into direct sunlight, a large truck passes by on the road. The environment transitions to a more open commercial street with storefront awnings and the first glimpses of waterfront railings and large digital billboards ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with commercial storefronts and seating areas

events.description: reaches the waterfront with water body becoming clearly visible on the left
slight turn to the right following the curve of the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing by seated pedestrians and various storefronts with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench reading a device

entered.detail: calm water surface of the bay or river along the promenade
tall futuristic towers with glass facades and neon accents
curved elevated highway ramp structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade with the water body clearly visible on the left. The camera follows the curve of the walkway past seated pedestrians and neon storefronts, with futuristic skyscrapers rising in the background and an elevated highway curving overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront boulevard with dense commercial signage and towering billboards

events.description: black sports car drives past on the waterfront road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved waterfront path with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards dominating the right side

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car driving along the waterfront road

entered.detail: massive floating advertisement displaying a pink-haired character
storefront with red and white barber pole signage
large olive-green military-style truck parked on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sweeping curve of the waterfront boulevard with the water now further to the left. Giant holographic billboards and futuristic skyscrapers dominate the skyline while vehicles including a black sports car pass by on the right. A green military truck is visible ahead parked along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street under elevated highway with parked military vehicle

events.description: approaching and navigating around the parked green military truck

agents.ego_description: following the green military truck along the sidewalk, navigating around the parked vehicle and continuing under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: green military-style truck parked on the side of the road blocking part of the view

entered.detail: small shop with illuminated signage and glass windows
short yellow and black posts along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the elevated highway structure, following a parked green military truck along the sidewalk. The waterfront is no longer visible as the path curves inland past convenience stores and commercial signage, with the truck dominating the forward view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban intersection into a wide waterfront promenade before curving back into the city's industrial heart. It begins by turning right from a covered intersection onto a sidewalk bordered by metal guardrails, moving through a narrow corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses where artificial neon light replaces the sun. As the camera exits the covered walkway into direct sunlight, the environment opens into a commercial street with storefront awnings and passing trucks before expanding further onto a sweeping waterfront boulevard. The scene then follows the curve of the promenade past seated pedestrians and giant holographic billboards, with futuristic skyscrapers and an elevated highway framing the skyline. Finally, the camera moves under the highway structure and turns inland, following a parked green military truck past convenience stores as the waterfront disappears from view.
